title: beached
body:
created on july 17, 2021

wav:

))}}

verse 1

i'm august like a bag of hot air
turn back time
i'm too sunny to not share
it's all love cuz
we all dust dunno how we got hear
dolled up
postin
hoping to get called up
y'all up
i'm having trouble sleeping
i'm trying to see if i can sus the secrets
from between the lines we ball up and keep in
what are you up to this weekend
what are you up to your neck in
what are you up to
i see you stretching but can't quite interpret the shadow play in your projection
i see the digits but not the depths and i can dig it but can't dive in yet
i'm trying to get it so i could get in
to that water and find you wet
i love swimmin with women men an nb in their own kinda vision
i love waving at the ocean people like to act fishy in
i love shining on each other and watching the glistening
divining the soul from the diamond it's signing
our names in the sand a reminder
that we aren't infinite
a message in a bottle with a chip in it
i'd love to meet you but my model ship didn't fit
i just wanted to tell you someone's out there
so i put myself in here
now i'm out here
and you're in there
and that might be the end of it
til the tide pulls in a bit
then i can try again i bet

verse 2

i'd go down on a current if they let me
won't go up on stage, you can't make me
i refuse to accept that i have to
yeah i'm that dude but it's not a bad attitude
people speak in platitudes but when they point
my vision's instantly attracted to options right there and then
so when someone push, i stay clear of em
when they stab it's hilarious
cuz they're already mad i'm the airiest
what's scary is i'm not alone in the area
so i'm wary of where i am and it wears me out
love a blanket of fog because it reminds me to go lie down
i could kiss a frog in my throat cuz i now i know not to talk out loud
there's prince inside me trying to climb out
if i can just sit quietly the angels'll come right down
all the angles
